report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages: ERC-8183 Agentic Commerce Standard guide and Crypto Retirement IRA/Pension guide, both with full SEO optimization and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: ERC-8183 Agentic Commerce: New Ethereum standard (Feb 2026, Draft) co-developed by Ethereum Foundation dAI team and Virtuals Protocol. Defines trustless job lifecycle (Open-Funded-Submitted-Terminal) with Client/Provider/Evaluator roles and escrow. World Chain adopted it. Virtuals has $479M in AI-driven GDP. Addresses $3M+ in unprotected agent-to-agent transactions.

Crypto Retirement Accounts: Bitcoin/crypto IRAs and 401(k)s growing rapidly. Key providers include Fidelity (1% spread, BTC/ETH/LTC), iTrustCapital (1% flat fee, 90+ cryptos), BitIRA, Alto, Swan Bitcoin. Major news: Australia's $105B Hostplus pension fund considering BTC for 2.2M members. Roth IRA offers tax-free crypto gains. Annual limits: $7K IRA / $23.5K 401(k).

sections.title: Content Created
items: ERC-8183 Agentic Commerce Guide: 1,036 lines, ~2,800 words, 10 content sections + FAQ (6 items), comparison table (ERC-8183 vs x402 vs ERC-8004), job lifecycle visual, hooks system deep dive, 4 related article links

Crypto Retirement IRA/Pension Guide 2026: 981 lines, ~3,200 words, 11 content sections + FAQ (6 items), provider comparison table (5 providers), Traditional vs Roth tax advantage breakdown, Hostplus institutional adoption section, 4 related article links

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: ERC-8183 page: Title 'ERC-8183 Guide 2026: The Agentic Commerce Standard Explained' (55 chars), 10 keywords targeting AI agent commerce searches, Article + FAQ structured data schemas, OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, canonical URL

Retirement page: Title 'Crypto IRA Guide 2026: Bitcoin & Crypto Retirement Accounts' (55 chars), 10 keywords targeting crypto retirement/IRA searches, Article + FAQ structured data schemas, OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, canonical URL
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts for next publishing batch
